name: Git Log
description: Query commit history with flexible filtering by author, date range, paths, and message patterns. Returns structured commit metadata.

parameters.name: ref
parameters.description: Starting ref (branch, tag, SHA). Defaults to HEAD.

parameters.name: maxCount
parameters.description: Maximum number of commits to return

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: Filter by author name or email pattern

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only commits after this date (e.g. '2024-01-01', '2 weeks ago')

parameters.name: grep
parameters.description: Filter commits whose message matches this pattern

outputDescription: List of commits. In JSON format: array of {sha, author, date, message, files}. Other formats return git's native output.
author: openspace
